text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is hard on herself and others, but
always looks out for those in need. She is the
Empress that many Umamusume look up to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In pursuit of her dream to be the ideal for all
Umamusume, she prepares to take on the Twinkle
Series.
